utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh ... hey ... hey ... hey ! There you are !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Umm , listen there is something I think you should know .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , is this about you ... you dating the nurse ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_is this about you ... you dating the nurse ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , Joey already told me , and I am so ... so fine .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I mean , you and I we are just , you know , we are nothing , we are goofin around .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Umm , actually I was about to tell you that I was , I was going to get out of it , but hey , if we are just goofing around then uh , maybe I will go out with him .
